{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame portal
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blackflame portal]] to the Arelius homeland is expected to open in about two years.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
